channel.title: typescript on Rohid's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in typescript on Rohid's Blog

item.title: Next.js Setup with TypeScript & Tailwind CSS
item.description: Let's create a next.js Project with TypeScript and Tailwindcss from scratch!

item.title: Next.js with Typescript
item.description: In this blog, we are going to see how easily we can implement TypeScript into a nextjs project. Are you excited? It's super simple to do trust me 😉.
